name: node-copy-concurrently
title: node-copy-concurrently
summary: Copy files, directories and symlinks concurrently
description:
Copy files, directories and symlinks concurrently
Promises of copies of files, directories and symlinks, with concurrency
controls and win32 junction fallback.
.
Ownership is maintained when running as root, permissions are always
maintained. On Windows, if symlinks are unavailable then junctions will be
used.
.
Node.js is an event-based server-side JavaScript engine.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use node-copy-concurrently because Copy files, directories and symlinks concurrently.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use node-copy-concurrently as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair node-copy-concurrently with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `node-copy-concurrently --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
